name: =?utf-8?Q?Jerry?=
subject: Go Vote April 6th!
body:
| | | |
---
| **Go Vote April 6th!**
---
| | |
---
| Hi friends! I want to encourage you to go vote in your local election Tuesday, April 6th from 6am-7pm in Illinois!!! If you care about what your children are taught in school & protecting them from indoctrination, protecting your neighborhood’s safety, and the affordability of your taxes, go vote! School Board, City, Township, and multiple other local races are on the ballot.

Contact your county website for your polling location and to look at your sample ballot. If you are in DuPage county, Illinois, click the following link - https://www.dupageco.org/VoterLookup/
**God bless you, and God bless America

-Jerry, Lisa, (& Michael) Evans**

**_Please check out my [website](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=d309f25f2c&e=b78e7c4d40) to learn more about me and [my vision](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=3c5a026c85&e=b78e7c4d40) for our country, and follow me one of my social media accounts to keep up with my journey._**
---

name: Matt Gaetz (Personal)
subject: They are coming for me

body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018ERbyRzdUcrPFaSa5fJG3FwbbQNrvGSA6W_KHByGtPQS9VeodHpBymeJ2dFL4lCrBLD3VZljjCPyI0D3tx4RmtIRoJUQSih1EgLdKo-0r_MCZkzhiraqoUDbA44i_Pu7u7xfArY9YkXqWZ_KDUAubAdnwZUwgBUe32LN7X3kf36iOfG7AM3XLA==&c=vCJ4vYFeNCA5LzBEVyH7QhKhpdyCpg1uZ212A-EMgerWImlQ02O_eQ==&ch=u_nSnVDEPITJ-wX0HulQN4w__NmKYygqPDkcPNiawJ5T3YWQJVZo1Q==)
---
| Peter,
A brand-new smear campaign has been launched against me, but I am fighting back to expose the truth.
The far-left New York Times has been publishing salacious allegations against me in an attempt to end my career fighting for the forgotten men and women of this country.
But the truth is, the mainstream media is publishing lies to try to take me down while covering up real scandals like Hunter Biden's deals in Ukraine and Governor Cuomo's assault against seniors in nursing homes. It is a shame that the Left tries to drag my dating life into their political attacks, but it's no surprise - when your ideas suck, you have to stoop this low.
---
| | | [CLICK HERE TO FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE DEEP STATE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018ERbyRzdUcrPFaSa5fJG3FwbbQNrvGSA6W_KHByGtPQS9VeodHpBymeJ2dFL4lCrBLD3VZljjCPyI0D3tx4RmtIRoJUQSih1EgLdKo-0r_MCZkzhiraqoUDbA44i_Pu7u7xfArY9YkXqWZ_KDUAubAdnwZUwgBUe32LN7X3kf36iOfG7AM3XLA==&c=vCJ4vYFeNCA5LzBEVyH7QhKhpdyCpg1uZ212A-EMgerWImlQ02O_eQ==&ch=u_nSnVDEPITJ-wX0HulQN4w__NmKYygqPDkcPNiawJ5T3YWQJVZo1Q==)

---
| [While the Left cheers and spreads these lies, I am going to need our support to fight back.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018ERbyRzdUcrPFaSa5fJG3FwbbQNrvGSA6W_KHByGtPQS9VeodHpBymeJ2dFL4lCrBLD3VZljjCPyI0D3tx4RmtIRoJUQSih1EgLdKo-0r_MCZkzhiraqoUDbA44i_Pu7u7xfArY9YkXqWZ_KDUAubAdnwZUwgBUe32LN7X3kf36iOfG7AM3XLA==&c=vCJ4vYFeNCA5LzBEVyH7QhKhpdyCpg1uZ212A-EMgerWImlQ02O_eQ==&ch=u_nSnVDEPITJ-wX0HulQN4w__NmKYygqPDkcPNiawJ5T3YWQJVZo1Q==)
I have always had a target on my back for being an American First conservative and for draining the swamp.
These lies against me come as no surprise after I decided to take on the most powerful institutions in the Beltway: the establishment; the FBI; the Biden Justice Department; the Cheney political dynasty; even the Justice Department under Trump.
I won't back down and roll over like Republicans have for decades. I will stay and fight the Establishment...but I need your help.
I am fighting against some of the most powerful institutions in the world that are bankrolled by globalist billionaires. I need every patriot to stand with me.
Can I count on your support?
---
| | | [CHIP IN TO FIGHT BACK](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018ERbyRzdUcrPFaSa5fJG3FwbbQNrvGSA6W_KHByGtPQS9VeodHpBymeJ2dFL4lCrBLD3VZljjCPyI0D3tx4RmtIRoJUQSih1EgLdKo-0r_MCZkzhiraqoUDbA44i_Pu7u7xfArY9YkXqWZ_KDUAubAdnwZUwgBUe32LN7X3kf36iOfG7AM3XLA==&c=vCJ4vYFeNCA5LzBEVyH7QhKhpdyCpg1uZ212A-EMgerWImlQ02O_eQ==&ch=u_nSnVDEPITJ-wX0HulQN4w__NmKYygqPDkcPNiawJ5T3YWQJVZo1Q==)

| Thank you for standing with me,

name: Team Mark Warner
subject: This is not what our Postal Service should be
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Louis DeJoy has done it again.

|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27275261/279570680/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTczNDk2NC1lMDk2LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GgZVQg0SQN5HMigp8hp8MhP-_h_Z7iew5ZNYUPYZGSI=&emci=5420c96e-4496-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=ae734964-e096-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek,

Trump Postmaster General Louis DeJoy has done it again. The 10-year plan he just released for the U.S. Postal Service would decimate the institution so many Americans rely on. It would lengthen mail delivery times, reduce post office hours, and increase postage prices; _The Washington Post_ called it **"the largest rollback of consumer mail services in a generation."**

**_Mark won't have it._** For months, he's been hearing horror stories from Virginians about delays in receiving life-saving medications and urgent bills. He's called on DeJoy to resign. He knows that we need to support the USPS and our postal workers – not undermine them.

**So Mark has gotten together with a number of Democratic colleagues to urge Congress to restore the USPS. But to get traction, we need to show _overwhelming_ grassroots support for the Postal Service. [Will you add your name to urge congressional action to support the USPS?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27275273/279570688/-1614654045?code=MW&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fwarner-uspsja%3Frefcode%3Dris_20210405_e_p_us_na_na_uspsja%26amount%3D10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTczNDk2NC1lMDk2LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GgZVQg0SQN5HMigp8hp8MhP-_h_Z7iew5ZNYUPYZGSI=&emci=5420c96e-4496-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=ae734964-e096-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=4568237)** **Goal: 10,000 signatures
Your signature recorded?
NOT YET** | [SIGN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27275279/279570694/-1614654045?code=MW&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fwarner-uspsja%3Frefcode%3Dris_20210405_e_p_us_na_na_uspsja%26amount%3D10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTczNDk2NC1lMDk2LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GgZVQg0SQN5HMigp8hp8MhP-_h_Z7iew5ZNYUPYZGSI=&emci=5420c96e-4496-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=ae734964-e096-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=4568237)

name: Candace Owens
subject: Show me your papers, Comrade
body:
---

| Peter,
---
| Joe Biden wants you and me to carry around a **VACCINE PASSPORT** ... so we can "prove" our medical history whenever a business or government official demands it.To say this is unconstitutional is an understatement. **It 's _un-American._** This much is clear: no one's going to _give_ us our freedoms back. **We have to TAKE them back**.**[Will you help me lead this fight... by pitching in just $25 to support me and my work?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57115701:JB5GpBuN8:m:1:3206719985:BA3F9E8220BC753E596726BA6EABDFD7:r "Will you help me lead this fight... by pitching in just $25 to support me and my

---
| For a year, our government has destroyed our economy, punished small businesses, denied our children an education, and alienated us from family and friends.Now,**they 're pressuring us to take a rushed, experimental vaccine.**And if you don't comply? **Joe Biden will ban you**... from the grocery store, from traveling to see your family, from going to restaurants and schools... _until you capitulate._**This pandemic was never about keeping us safe.** This was about the far-Left grabbing more power than ever before... and gutting our basic freedoms and dignity as human beings.
They won't stop unless we make them stop, Peter. **[Pitch in $25 or more right away, and let's put the COVID tyrants back in their place.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57115701:JB5GpBuN8:m:1:3206719985:BA3F9E8220BC753E596726BA6EABDFD7:r "Pitch in $25 or

subject: I’m grateful for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://email
body:
|

| | Peter,

I can’t thank you enough for your unwavering support through our most important fundraising deadline yet. You have once again exceeded my expectations and we were able to show the power of Democrats uniting.

We faced one of our toughest challenges head on, and it paid off. We’re going to report strong numbers for our first FEC deadline.

I vow to you: I’m not going to give up or give in. This is just the start of our journey, and I’m going to keep putting everything I have into fighting for what’s right. **I’m focused on helping out my fellow Democrats so we can hold onto our majority — it’s the only way we’ll pass the important policies that Americans deserve.**

I’m so glad I have you on my team. Thank you for all that you do, always.

Mike

name: Rand Paul
subject: Help me defeat socialism in the classroom
body:
I came to Washington, D.C. just over a decade ago with one overarching mission: to support and defend our Constitution and the political and personal freedoms it upholds. Do you want to know something important I’ve learned? [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c912%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=q26Kg3Hy%2f%2bApyPPkj4Z27g&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1852%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TXpoE4wBa63e23XOTnazvA&sysid=1)

Friend,

I came to Washington, D.C. just over a decade ago with one overarching mission: to support and defend our Constitution and the political and personal freedoms it upholds. **Do you want to know something important I’ve learned? **

Politicians will not save us.

The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic. _Politics is downstream from culture_. Restoring our Republic requires a citizenry who understands the principles of the Founding Fathers, capitalism, and our Constitution.

**Which is why I am supporting the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE):** FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility.

In fact, the Foundation for Economic Education has launched “FEE In the Classroom.”

It is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teach young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

As thousands of young Americans come to understand the positive impact freedom has on their lives, their communities, and our country through FEE in the Classroom workshops, their most frequently asked question afterwards is : “ _why haven’t I heard these ideas before_?”

You and I both know why these students have never heard the ideas of liberty before: _America’s public schools don’t teach our nation’s founding principles anymore_. But FEE is changing this--and they are doing it in classrooms and virtual classrooms across the country.

[**I am PERSONALLY supporting FEE In the Classroom and am asking all of my supporters to contribute or even sponsor a FEE In the Classroom program. Please click here to contribute $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $10. **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1853%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kOQH5H2qUWOgsVKdRS%2bEsQ&sysid=1)

[**Help more high school and college students learn about free markets, entrepreneurship, and our Founding Principles by supporting FEE In the Classroom! **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1854%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z82HD9jpj5H5buP74S8tew&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1852%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TXpoE4wBa63e23XOTnazvA&sysid=1)

**_Let me tell you more about FEE In the Classroom and why you should support this essential program and FEE’s efforts to defeat socialism in the classroom_.**

It’s no secret the Radical Left, Cancel Culture, and big government have teamed up to indoctrinate our nation’s youth into embracing socialism.

The sad truth is that free market capitalism, the history of our Founding Fathers, entrepreneurship, and are NOT being taught in high schools or college campuses across the country.

FEE’s President, Zilvinas Silenas, knows this more than anyone... Zilvinas once lived under the Soviet Union’s Communist rule in Lithuania. He’s now made it his life’s mission to educate young people about the dangers of socialism and how free markets and free people solve problems.

Trust me... if some of my colleagues in the U.S. Senate attended a FEE In the Classroom teaching, we would not be the same mess we are in today.

**Here is our goal:** I am trying to help FEE raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours to help fund FEE In the Classroom workshops for over 1,000 students. I hope you will consider making a donation of ANY size by using one of the links below:

[**Donate $10 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>> **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1865%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3%2beWvLA1AYFOnUWdj3VVCA&sysid=1)

Friend, I’m sure you share my frustration with the direction of our country. We cannot count on our government for fiscal restraint, nor our schools or universities for any fair argument for free-market ideas.

[**Today I invite you to join me, and thousands of other committed Americans, in supporting FEE and contributing to the economic education of the young men and women who will lead our nation tomorrow.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c1866%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZaZ6fEgQz1r5fbfonZNtHQ&sysid=1)

I hope I can count on your support and see your name on the list of FEE’s newest supporters.

Thank you for everything,

Senator Rand Paul

_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c912%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=q26Kg3Hy%2f%2bApyPPkj4Z27g&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c912%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=q26Kg3Hy%2f%2bApyPPkj4Z27g&sysid=1)

name: Republican Surveys via Team Pete
subject: Kamala Harris is in charge
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETE FOR GOVERNOR
body:
and it's a disaster &zwnj

_**First,** Joe Biden ENDED construction on the border wall.
**Then,** he welcomed illegal immigrants and started a MASSIVE amnesty program.

body:
Friend,

Who is really in charge in the White House?

Joe Biden can't be bothered to deal with the biggest crisis in his presidency, so he tasked Kamala Harris to handle the disaster at the border.

[**The only problem? During her first week at the helm to fix the crisis, VP Harris had no immigration related meetings on her schedule.** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tiIRaQ5DtCsMjecaFOp-jFFhh5ACmBCoXfKGgLPouGYIl9UNW9ydoQp9ZqhAGCgFmyJdGK--bd8OvgoY6bZW4avYu54hYt5jlNMKPLBBvo4josn2cflbiMnphPqIyPsmWOn3vyOjmN0O9UbENgM8rMyyDpM42UteGeBkO3qwdvLWax7pejZ_MPSiC9Squ28MkLTTanRZX07nVj4RaoHkHTqWEFZonnPhS9bDv-Jmiw3MS6XoRegcMNEdHKY5BrKkbmdUaIygm2pnBkqYjrADAI7mp5f6t3I5pXWnhpOgRDRDebMYbxP5fykXruVChsjPNFtDTxV3cQK7ukiSuiE3DLO-XC8Y1EOzGnLr-Gp-2BbxsqoA4wRiAWpYrnZzrgG1GZKsxNuD28fdj_WQhjJQoyKvvq8V4LnFV6Xn8--qbMg=&c=eeELSCYMG1fZVYPljFMChqQWxGqmrvbjScugy7DhrdeVUHP7l4JLuA==&ch=16SRBmxIX1ZcDkfoWI8ZDxcFNHU-AId3ra6z-nBD-YdMt0BJRwsMCg==)

Date: Monday, March 29, 2021
Subject: Democracy Dies in Darkness
[DEMAND TRANSPARENCY](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qy1JUY90ENyVGwoeBG8Oxg27KSx1i51yXdfOL-hOztIR7l2aBYAXiRqkK3Qd2dBGE69GLBJyHDYpz0Qix9V2u3Dua3rWICKBAhmPdHzCpg8GjPx7nXZ-QC72PmydkO3QsyY1RoHXrTiFnliS2E8WDT4kTv5ZJs4IjTIHULTGGN_WIUzLpCFMUnnAhd6POG0RGgIBJwj3MGRLQg-9HVUKFab4n4LT7l_7YO-eMXF7rTF0-PHXfiIyUMPcKZtHxriIiovmpLizzJpGf_7fqZjN0I4oTMSjBbnSKMSeOi_bW1EJ4obgcsTyJPg9ErOxPEXg_k0Gt8OONh0EOSEEcwa1alSco3BRwicFcaCp9feNfrSOR4YdxYSWb1_mttnzMuR1PxYojz9UqV4=&c=IyEzZAjpkCgV56a_VtLD-4nE1FPKS7sv72aDNTJS1azuElA_ZxQNaQ==&ch=A5VIW3pCspUupgG58DEymN2ZnNzzHZH86hrFA0PWsmz95ysKbPTfvA==)
Friend,

Joe Biden is HIDING. Partisan politics aside, Americans deserve answers to basic questions like:
* Why did they block the media's border access?
* Why did the White House officially change its name to the Biden-Harris Administration?

\- Human Traffickers: Making MILLIONS of dollars per day
\- Positive COVID cases brought in each day: UNKNOWN

The Biden Administration can't turn a blind eye any longer, Friend.

What's happening at the border is a full blown CRISIS, and something MUST be done.

The surge of migrants and unaccompanied minors is no one but the Biden administration's fault, yet they're refusing to take responsibility. **Something MUST be done. **

I'm calling on conservatives across the country to stand with me in this fight before it's too late. If we don't do something, NO ONE will. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have made it clear that resolving this border crisis is NOT one of their priorities, however, it is a TOP priority of mine, Friend.

**If YOU want to restore security at our border and put a STOP to this dangerous wave of illegal immigrants,[_SIGN THE PETITION NOW to secure our southern border once again!_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K8z2kvYS8vDM93BqYyL8URmaKN9_KIqPdI3SZfoRsBcRnnHztOQW8cD36KTR4lzontMsc-G72EQhTUogRL4B0jNKQ0SfNveryeFWX3_s7yz29xx9ERlempGCEKCW8gl_dr2Q-EO07kaD0iyPlLfBzKkcwkvsngUuqNTWuWoMwg9z5sp33_6XpwyqVhDD69al8AFWL9PrbmodWEoz1gJf90DTjOh6_g4cHEeHR2g698dGrUh7g1GjxjAhTfyTiYxLIFZl8ZMp1fR-3ScRrm2c2rZZXwHXgj7z0PQj8UyscoZae4MtdG2X7xnAvPr0eAF0uilfUNkb_a_Lk2Zebjvjs0nGIXRX_HPe15XpUvGeyKv4qK4RAGU5Vb-ND7ExPxrM4gHmukSYde85Bwb49KJSvQpS9iyC3vGgeMLF6cKuoHW7RgANXwJ6pO-cX53y_FYf&c=0f4mDxyuaVhFfyLfRKgIh_NTHp2136gimf3mzk-8Qgo2amhCtehNiw==&ch=uoZeq2wRZxLk2OcBlr4JwPIYic1oM7klR4srJWf4tgH9MYZdboh-fw==)**

body:
|
---
| | | | [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001see9TXzSOZ4OGSJVV8GWkFJd_3wtcrLNJf7ffTfKs8X_s88yBTEoU040l9PE5qOEojwwv9k5UCZ6n_OoPQffmLQEiYh3pCW2TiN0QCkmRM_bR-M9RJw3V_GUJk35cAveSpBRQTORawR2Fw39q98rkHBcEf8P8_yHYOORkHvFvrWEblOJeo_GsaHZDcFAswModyQbLtFR4TwH1vg21DvO5fEepDkoPTDoqkwSSQ_E15aUQOUHMuvYTq279pAoeojes-qFB9dBeY-FKX086DeE65cd45qAlYFganU6rRoIdnb2rIWUXNMDj_fTlCN9dP-Ycl5UJWdBmDhCSR0QjNRuRYTt_r8AT7iF6QLFs62CJu1e4JzKY3XsoaxXTqidoWuJnuvJbnl6ayolVIILFEp0lqlqmCUf8IXpr-VVQ33_eilDvmlqZ_NUSA==&c=yOOVIcyHGPnev6ils6rN5TZVOj_-YTRzyJMB3VZodwXvfNWvVAXvpg==&ch=oVxGsffhZNaDWCKLfPeUgWPuDfR14reIOBaZO4yamBeaGwUMcuZdmQ== "20210405_FightForConstructionWorkers_1")
---

Last week President Biden unveiled his $2 trillion infrastructure plan and claimed this plan would create 'millions of good-paying jobs' **\-- but those are jobs for the coastal elites in California and New York. **

Were our American oil and gas construction workers included in these 'millions of good-paying jobs?' **The answer: NO.**

Once again, Biden has turned a blind eye to our construction workers who are living paycheck-to-paycheck to cater to his mega-money donors. _**Enough is enough****, we need to get our American energy workers back. **_

---
| | | [CONTINUE THE KEYSTONE XL PIPELINE -> SAVE AMERICAN ENERGY JOBS](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001see9TXzSOZ4OGSJVV8GWkFJd_3wtcrLNJf7ffTfKs8X_s88yBTEoU040l9PE5qOEojwwv9k5UCZ6n_OoPQffmLQEiYh3pCW2TiN0QCkmRM_bR-M9RJw3V_GUJk35cAveSpBRQTORawR2Fw39q98rkHBcEf8P8_yHYOORkHvFvrWEblOJeo_GsaHZDcFAswModyQbLtFR4TwH1vg21DvO5fEepDkoPTDoqkwSSQ_E15aUQOUHMuvYTq279pAoeojes-qFB9dBeY-FKX086DeE65cd45qAlYFganU6rRoIdnb2rIWUXNMDj_fTlCN9dP-Ycl5UJWdBmDhCSR0QjNRuRYTt_r8AT7iF6QLFs62CJu1e4JzKY3XsoaxXTqidoWuJnuvJbnl6ayolVIILFEp0lqlqmCUf8IXpr-VVQ33_eilDvmlqZ_NUSA==&c=yOOVIcyHGPnev6ils6rN5TZVOj_-YTRzyJMB3VZodwXvfNWvVAXvpg==&ch=oVxGsffhZNaDWCKLfPeUgWPuDfR14reIOBaZO4yamBeaGwUMcuZdmQ== "Generic Button")
---

Since Biden signed the Executive Order to halt the construction of the Keystone XL Pipeline, I have been fighting for our oil and gas workers. **[By signing my petition below, you will join the fight and stand up for the hard-working men and women who the Biden Administration is ignoring.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001see9TXzSOZ4OGSJVV8GWkFJd_3wtcrLNJf7ffTfKs8X_s88yBTEoU040l9PE5qOEojwwv9k5UCZ6n_OoPQffmLQEiYh3pCW2TiN0QCkmRM_bR-M9RJw3V_GUJk35cAveSpBRQTORawR2Fw39q98rkHBcEf8P8_yHYOORkHvFvrWEblOJeo_GsaHZDcFAswModyQbLtFR4TwH1vg21DvO5fEepDkoPTDoqkwSSQ_E15aUQOUHMuvYTq279pAoeojes-qFB9dBeY-FKX086DeE65cd45qAlYFganU6rRoIdnb2rIWUXNMDj_fTlCN9dP-Ycl5UJWdBmDhCSR0QjNRuRYTt_r8AT7iF6QLFs62CJu1e4JzKY3XsoaxXTqidoWuJnuvJbnl6ayolVIILFEp0lqlqmCUf8IXpr-VVQ33_eilDvmlqZ_NUSA==&c=yOOVIcyHGPnev6ils6rN5TZVOj_-YTRzyJMB3VZodwXvfNWvVAXvpg==&ch=oVxGsffhZNaDWCKLfPeUgWPuDfR14reIOBaZO4yamBeaGwUMcuZdmQ== "By signing my petition below, you will join the fight and stand up for the hard-working men and women who the Biden Administration is ignoring. ")**

clean_body: | | | | | == "20210405FightForConstructionWorkers1" Last week President Biden unveiled his $2 trillion infrastructure plan and claimed this plan would create 'millions of good-paying jobs' \-- but those are jobs for the coastal elites in California and New York. Were our American oil and gas construction workers included in these 'millions of good-paying jobs?' The answer: NO. Once again, Biden has turned a blind eye to our construction workers who are living paycheck-to-paycheck to cater to his mega-money donors. name: Mike Espy
subject: A common sense way to expand health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Fairness Project
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27288618/279615667/-1078230000?refcode=em1_hc_rest20donors_ABopeners_0406&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTA5M2UzZC0wMTk3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEtolVEK7igTjoxVNFjvVgrG7jydoe97vKtQreKhPDU=) _Thank you so much for being a past supporter of my campaigns! Today I'm excited to introduce you to my friends at The Fairness Project, one of the most successful organizations making real progress on important issues like health care. If you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here](https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/5032a9ce-fe96-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef/da093e3d-0197-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTA5M2UzZC0wMTk3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEtolVEK7igTjoxVNFjvVgrG7jydoe97vKtQreKhPDU=&id=102101357)._ Hi team, Mike Espy here. When I ran for Senate last year, I ran to be the "health care senator” because I wanted to solve this problem once and for all. And I’m still committed to that fight. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to **[make a donation to The Fairness Project, one of the most successful organizations across the country fighting for, and winning, campaigns to expand health care -- even when Donald Trump was president.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27288619/279615669/-1078230000?refcode=em1_hc_rest20donors_ABopeners_0406&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTA5M2UzZC0wMTk3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEtolVEK7igTjoxVNFjvVgrG7jydoe97vKtQreKhPDU=)** But first, let me tell you why this issue is so important to me, and how The Fairness Project has made real progress on it. Mississippi is one of 12 states that has not expanded Medicaid, putting partisan politics over common sense. Our leaders are leaving money on the table that would go directly towards delivering care to those in need. This is personal to me. My grandfather built the first hospital in Mississippi serving Black patients, in 1924. And I’ve seen firsthand how health care is a racial justice issue. Over 130,000 Black Mississippians don’t have health insurance -- but would have access to care if we expanded Medicaid. **But here’s the good news: my friends at The Fairness Project are making real progress on health care and other important issues for so many Americans.** They’ve expanded Medicaid in 6 red and purple states by running people-powered ballot initiative campaigns that go around partisan politics and let the people decide for themselves. _And they’re just getting started._ They’re looking into more campaigns to expand Medicaid, potentially including my home state of Mississippi, as well as other campaigns to raise wages, guarantee paid leave, and make real change directly at the ballot box. **But they need our help. The special interests always spend BIG against them, and partisan politicians are already trying to silence the will of the people and make it harder to win these ballot initiative campaigns.** **[Can you contribute to The Fairness Project to help them respond to the attacks and win more campaigns for health care across the country? They're truly one of my favorite progressive organizations out there today, so I hope you'll consider making a contribution.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27288621/279615670/-1078230000?refcode=em1_hc_rest20donors_ABopeners_0406&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTA5M2UzZC0wMTk3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEtolVEK7igTjoxVNFjvVgrG7jydoe97vKtQreKhPDU=) ** | **[Contribute →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27288623/279615672/-1078230000?refcode=em1_hc_rest20donors_ABopeners_0406&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTA5M2UzZC0wMTk3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEtolVEK7igTjoxVNFjvVgrG7jydoe97vKtQreKhPDU=)**
---
According to some metrics, my home state of Mississippi is the least healthy state in the country.
Yet the politicians who are supposed to represent us have ignored the health of our neighbors. They’d rather play political games than help those in need.
That’s why I ran for the U.S. Senate and it’s why I’m still fighting for health care and justice for all.
**The Fairness Project is keeping up that fight too.** They're planning campaigns in 2021 and 2022 to make real change on health care and racial justice, regardless of who's in power.
They've seen firsthand how **when we let the people vote on issues directly, we can avoid the political games and bitter divides and make real change**.
**[And that’s why I’m proud to be supporting The Fairness Project, and I hope you’ll consider making a contribution to power their work: cutting through the partisan noise and winning ballot initiative campaigns to expand health care and change lives.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27288625/279615674/-1078230000?refcode=em1_hc_rest20donors_ABopeners_0406&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTA5M2UzZC0wMTk3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEtolVEK7igTjoxVNFjvVgrG7jydoe97vKtQreKhPDU=)**
**[Contribute →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27288637/279615676/-1078230000?refcode=em1_hc_rest20donors_ABopeners_0406&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTA5M2UzZC0wMTk3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEtolVEK7igTjoxVNFjvVgrG7jydoe97vKtQreKhPDU=)**
---
Together, we’ll continue to move our country forward. Thanks for being in the fight.
Mike Espy

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27288638/279615689/1100783424?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTA5M2UzZC0wMTk3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEtolVEK7igTjoxVNFjvVgrG7jydoe97vKtQreKhPDU=&emci=5032a9ce-fe96-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=da093e3d-0197-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=561582) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27288640/279615690/-1451982884?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTA5M2UzZC0wMTk3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEtolVEK7igTjoxVNFjvVgrG7jydoe97vKtQreKhPDU=&emci=5032a9ce-fe96-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=da093e3d-0197-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=561582)

Paid for by The Fairness Project. Thank you for supporting The Fairness Project. Your unwavering support helps us bring economic fairness to millions of Americans and put power directly in the hands of voters through ballot initiatives. The Fairness Project has won 20 ballot initiatives since 2016, changing the lives of nearly 18 million people by raising the minimum wage, expanding access to health care, capping payday lending, and winning paid leave. And we're just getting started. If you would like more ways to keep in touch and stay involved, please consider following us on [Facebook](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27288642/279615692/-200381251?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTA5M2UzZC0wMTk3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEtolVEK7igTjoxVNFjvVgrG7jydoe97vKtQreKhPDU=&emci=5032a9ce-fe96-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=da093e3d-0197-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=561582) and [Twitter](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27288644/279615695/602506525?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTA5M2UzZC0wMTk3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEtolVEK7igTjoxVNFjvVgrG7jydoe97vKtQreKhPDU=&emci=5032a9ce-fe96-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=da093e3d-0197-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=561582). Your partnership allows us to make all this possible. If you'd like to donate to help fund our efforts, please [click here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27288646/279615696/-2060721979?refcode=TFP-footer&recurring=auto&amount=35&amounts=5,35,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTA5M2UzZC0wMTk3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEtolVEK7igTjoxVNFjvVgrG7jydoe97vKtQreKhPDU=). name: Rep. Miller-Meeks
subject: I just had to say thank you....
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Thanks to YOU and your support,the voice of the people of Iowa's Second Congressional District prevails over Nancy Pelosi.

****
Visit here to [unsubscribe](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9351553/224717773/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTkzNTE1NTM%3d&x=65fc4d7c).

Hey Fellow Patriot-

I'm Republican Congresswoman Mariannette Miller-Meeks, and **I know you know the story of my 6-vote win here in Iowa 's Second Congressional District.** Our team's winning result was certified by a non-partisan state board, counted, and counted again. But National Democrats led by California Liberal Nancy Pelosi tried to steal this election.

She is nervous and she will do anything to get this seat. No wonder! [**She currently holds a House majority by slimmer numbers than my victory margin.**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9351553/224717773/197273/2/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=ff370e67)

**Good news -Nancy Pelosi FAILED. Last week, my opponent finally conceded the election.** As I'm sure you can imagine, I am deeply appreciative we are ending this now.

I'm so grateful for the outpouring of love I've received over these trying months from our supporters on the ground like you, Fellow Patriot.

[](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9351553/224717773/197273/3/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=0a3a44cb)

Because of your support, we were able to take Iowa's Second Congressional District BACK from the National Democrats and protect those results from Nancy Pelosi. And now, with your continued support, we can FIRE Nancy Pelosi and take the Speaker's Gavel from her hands!

[**FIRE NANCY PELOSI >>>**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9351553/224717773/197273/4/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=465e9ae6)

Fellow Patriot, one might assume our election was a special election because **how would it be possible for someone to continue to contest the results of an election from four months ago?**

You know that's exactly what my opponent did, Fellow Patriot.** [She didn't go through the courts in Iowa-she went right to the National Democrats. She depended on Nancy Pelosi and her Democrat cronies to steal this seat from the Iowans who voted for me.](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9351553/224717773/197273/5/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=4ab4d625)**

And because Pelosi's majority is hanging on by a THREAD, she tried to use her power and influence to BULLY Iowa into overturning the election and giving this seat to one of her hand-picked Democrats.

**But thanks to YOU and your support of our House Republicans, Fellow Patriot, the voice of the people of Iowa 's Second Congressional District prevails over Nancy Pelosi.**

As you can guess, Fellow Patriot, I am relieved that my election season is all over and I am truly appreciative we are ending this now.

**And Fellow Patriot, I simply could not let this moment pass without personally thanking you.**

Because of your support of House Republicans, I was able to protect the voice of my constituents-the people of Iowa's Second Congressional District. [**I was able to STOP Nancy Pelosi 's steal of our hard-fought win.**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9351553/224717773/197273/6/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=f33221c4)

And I will work my hardest every day to represent all my constituents-whether one of the 6 people who brought my team over the finish line, or one of the people who voted for my opponent.

Every door knocked.

| **Fake News Files** Welcome to the second edition of my newsletter! This week, we are debuting a feature we're calling, "The Fake News Files". The purpose of The Fake News Files is to expose the lies, dishonesty, and shameless leftwing bias of the mainstream media for everyone to see. Too many so-called journalists don't care about reporting facts anymore and are nothing more than Democratic operatives in disguise. The Fake News Files will name and expose some of the most egregious examples of fake news that you could imagine. If you have any suggestions or examples from your local papers, please feel free to submit your own ideas for future editions!
---
| | [ ](http://tr.email.donjr.com/c/eJwdjtsOgyAQRL9GHgku9wcebNr-B8qqNHiJYP39UpNJZiab7JzgvOcgLIkOGLRMMNVKDpzRllrZKSMst-LxkvYpG8Fw8THRsK2fgw7bQmYntPJ8ZIYr2SuOoHoUEIZW6iABeksWB1YA08aQ5OZS9tzwroF31RgTZrqeQ8Iz736qpT6th3ug-j2Xa8i4Bqj-jQE3OpclkcOF_Yopxax0JZtusj9TcSteOWEpeMAPeOhERg)
---
| **#1 - Jeff Bezo’s Washington Post is Killing Democracy in Darkness...**
---
The sanctimonious Washington Post has claimed the motto “Democracy Dies in Darkness,” yet they have been the biggest abuser of anonymous sourcing to drive their stories. Now, months after reporting a lie that my father instructed an election official in Georgia to “find fraud,” the audio file of the actual conversation has been discovered. He did not say anything even close to that. Yet, the “scoop” backed by a single anonymous source led to wall-to-wall national coverage. Now, months later, after the dust has settled, the Washington Post has issued a correction. They were flat out wrong. Will anyone be held accountable? Nope. But, you know... Democracy Dies in Darkness. **#2 – Liberal Media Heads Explode when Rep. McCarthy Visits the US-Mexico Border**
It’s not too hard to trigger the leftist media when you deliver facts that run counter to their narrative. That’s what happened recently when House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy visited the border with a delegation of House members. He pointed out the threat being presented by illegal crossings that have included known suspects of terror who are on the FBI’s watch list. He was mocked by Twitter leftists and even Business Insider’s “Senior Politics Reporter.” Getting to the truth was of little interest to these types, but that’s no surprise. Also of no surprise was when Customs and Border Protection came out and confirmed four people matching individuals on the terror watch list were arrested trying to enter the U.S. illegally since October. The fake news is ALWAYS going to fake news. **#3 – Woke Bureaucrats Takeover Dept. of Defense Twitter to Smear Tucker**
It’s a scary state when woke, leftist bureaucrats can takeover official government channels to attack a journalist. Yet, that’s exactly what happened this week when Tucker Carlson shared his views on how the U.S. military is putting social experimentations in front of its true priority of developing the most effective killing force in the world. Tucker is entitled to his opinion, and government communication channels should not be weaponized against journalists, a practice that the fake news embraces and amplifies in order to peddle their leftist narratives. **#4 – The Stumble Seen Around the World**
When it comes to national defense and international affairs, the strength of our military is just as important as the strength of our Commander-in-Chief. That’s why the viral clip of Joe Biden basically face planting—not once, but three times—on his way up the stairs is so concerning. Yet, the media immediately snapped into a defensive posture, peddling stories that he was “100% fine,” according to the NYTimes headline. This reminded me of the coverage of my father taking his time walking down a ramp last year. Biden mocked him, the media got every medical expert they could to cast doubt about his health, and it got wall-to-wall coverage on late night T.V. These people are sick and as the world is now seeing, so is Joe Biden.

body:
President Trump said that he is considering another presidential run, but it all depends on the support he gets from grassroots conservatives.

****PRESIDENTIAL POLL

Do you want Donald Trump to run for President in 2024?****
****[**YES**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I-qHk9jOucKR21V7J7-YaxYnjDnKSFOMxoAOQVyser3j0fk7xFYT063SpnPAU1juPghLvmqHs5SByy3Ogj-7OyjU9-ZsXqqlka-ZPkbUDHuV3yQUG8GoGwJ36gZAeqPs9gm8fUtNjLhb5Fj5yBEi72PfVS528PRyNd8b_Sq7b09x3jqw_9LZ9sGp8hEqX2nmKfLslf7hBJ7-haRv_LDXFiuMJ17Zdu0g9CfszCzRv04hkSRwS0mZjxZcT6uw7KrrqZ7t-PKDhk6rrIM-cWqayGccyXnq21qdmnov2CEqUW1VKo0CANP9ivZ8Qtbh9eSGu-7H5ZkxNObTZl-eLpuBIO6zozISk-jsUBl556d-IUGyGD6fD73464F7TEuYKTJPozbnwgsmdlUJmrL3E-hYFdXR59D6exOIPejt1nLF2ixC11FQ0bnzgpAehWxObePzjTLGvJjuuSQ=&c=eAyWPhYjf-Tb0zyROYVnnm-MpOgJdGSvIV-5OyLbrUG22LliTwbpaw==&ch=QsqO1Xp0geRFOqbehEr3dwz_XDDvqqh9Rfe2R6cryOHQNpAvFqWctw==)**** ****[**NO**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I-qHk9jOucKR21V7J7-YaxYnjDnKSFOMxoAOQVyser3j0fk7xFYT063SpnPAU1juPghLvmqHs5SByy3Ogj-7OyjU9-ZsXqqlka-ZPkbUDHuV3yQUG8GoGwJ36gZAeqPs9gm8fUtNjLhb5Fj5yBEi72PfVS528PRyNd8b_Sq7b09x3jqw_9LZ9sGp8hEqX2nmKfLslf7hBJ7-haRv_LDXFiuMJ17Zdu0g9CfszCzRv04hkSRwS0mZjxZcT6uw7KrrqZ7t-PKDhk6rrIM-cWqayGccyXnq21qdmnov2CEqUW1VKo0CANP9ivZ8Qtbh9eSGu-7H5ZkxNObTZl-eLpuBIO6zozISk-jsUBl556d-IUGyGD6fD73464F7TEuYKTJPozbnwgsmdlUJmrL3E-hYFdXR59D6exOIPejt1nLF2ixC11FQ0bnzgpAehWxObePzjTLGvJjuuSQ=&c=eAyWPhYjf-Tb0zyROYVnnm-MpOgJdGSvIV-5OyLbrUG22LliTwbpaw==&ch=QsqO1Xp0geRFOqbehEr3dwz_XDDvqqh9Rfe2R6cryOHQNpAvFqWctw==)**** ********

Fellow Patriot,

clean_body: Every minute that goes by, another vote is cast. | Friend, Your last-minute support could mean the difference between winning and losing the spring elections in Wisconsin TODAY. Our team will not stop working until the FINAL VOTE IS CAST to ensure conservatives win elections for: ✅ Wisconsin Department of Public Instruction Superintendent✅ Wisconsin Court of Appeals Judges✅ School board members✅ Local government officials I can confidently tell you that the candidates we are investing in have real prospects to win TODAY. But most importantly, they share our values and have the fighting spirit to deliver commonsense solutions to our state during these difficult times. Here are a few of our endorsed candidates: • A retired nurse who is using her medical expertise to fight for the safe way to get kids back in class...• A mom of an autistic 13-year-old who has tried to virtually school him and her other student in between assisting hundreds more families coming to the food and diaper bank she runs...• A fed-up dad who is also a cop, fighting for freedom from partisan agendas inside kids’ classrooms... These heroes define what it means to be a grassroots leader. They’re everyday folks who are fed up with the status quo and taking concrete action to make a difference. But now they need YOUR help. With every passing minute, another vote is cast -- so we need to make sure that conservatives are showing up to the polls in droves. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Paid for by Rebecca PAC PO Box 620215, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Laura Loomer
subject: I’m dropping something big . . .
body:
Last week I was banned on Stripe.Now, I’m having my videos pulled off YouTube!
---
Last week I was banned on Stripe. Now, I’m having my videos pulled off YouTube!
| | | | Patriot,

[](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/f05t4Xbqxu4fhB7oD1B8WUSt4wNec1XhGplmV7G7SAtHK_FviaTVwceCpVsxDXN_Kb0mmU4GyO5gGGx-FILG-SX1aPol3rcK4ZUcRt3D3F_L5zBfKtQBk14vWmL6kQQCwWGmt1eLOKIWRjdFcRu79eJdp7Y1lUTSESSQIjYv3lfWdE27PqgvVuhy9s-gd6ucJvgTe0YdGsUQyaRb1GmLlLw2doZb0roxEX1CLdDhYeC4oyUm-73CpbQlswLtrWuHdRXdRxlH8npmJVtLk8UrJMbRxP_v6CG8khs6gg) Last week I was banned on Stripe.

Now, I’m having my videos pulled off YouTube!

[**Learn how you can help fight back here.**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/tYykUkuroah0GN2YmsiaS5g4qQXXZOlWKfdcu-LHC1Aqh6kojvX6duodSZjWZB3oIXdOCcXdNVOEi96W6zE94sCtvcWvLt4H6rMfRcJ1PNZke58rtxSfGkdSvYPgbPclrMdkIrer3rY4P212JAmQR5en28HB4oJJPdj1OgiddJtIx7pfbDTdImKjcMXTo_qML7kWoxIVZVEGeLn5NPLzEUq19b_So5aynHqPKawWSniCfpqu0Hqk12HsirBqprrrPlOasnu-P_GCsT20BihPKpg8V25CDKVL5VTjmg)

One video that YouTube targeted was over three years old and taken down for what the company is calling “violent or graphic content.”

When have I EVER posted anything violent or graphic?

Never.

But just to see what YouTube considers “violent” or “graphic” I typed in the words “extreme violence” into the search bar on YouTube.

WOW!

**In less than a minute, I watched two people get shot and one violent street fight at Disneyland.**

This isn’t JUST about double standards, this is about targeting and silencing conservative views . . . it’s nothing new, and it’s getting worse.

Over Easter weekend, **Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene had her Twitter account suspended**.

Even Disney actress Gina Carano’s Twitter account was shadow-banned recently for her conservative speech which the left called “transphobic”.

Oh yeah, and Disney fired her from her prominent role in _The Mandalorian_.

Big Tech isn’t going to stop until we make enough noise and cost them enough money so that they’re forced to change their ways.

But it’s not just Big Tech.

In the coming weeks, I’ll be filing litigation and I will be disclosing **some of the big brands that are behind Cancel Culture**.

**This will be HUGE.**
[**And I want you to be part of this.**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/EHBwkAmCFM7n5w5R5uQai-vxPITCxxKy6jUhQM_6zlVxDKZArhoMiRMbA5UC3Piyje4pam0aqhMj_EqD4KkwnXY8VDQ9posVKfm-ZptNHcsWraTot_wL8LauaNHzazNQrYacTxp_V1p9EAMV56_IYHr6lHNNuTVkQeqkUzNGqMWGQAJ5n7VXvOwqtfHylOCcG1KyTibMOAXVNRIHKqu1MtIRTTgNsKpii3ua1DhCCEyVgfKz6fUNQRrCyvl9d6n3hUFi97ciz11QW-BbigCf6nsjlL9zAaBc9e9mFQ)

You’re giving these brands money right now – yes YOU. And as soon as I start dropping names, **they’re going to double their efforts to get rid of me**.

So I need your help in a few ways.

First, [**I need a quick donation from you**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/5uC8deg8IMOKmPovUxpAHpMUoyL16nAf3g8noDeUOI9rQEc65M8xoE82psQ-Gj8Q11ZBBtrowO9mz_aon18P1AxR8vjx7Gtplb7Zfg9Lj_bs5K5uuRRNtdmFOge-IzvyPAfdBWNv7bGsvaocuJxltFiJzWQQb_ACy6YqgvuixF0VpL6SFWpfth7wiKm6Os1yErLW4aXLvPFNJZM7kAHTB9sfUu8AyAKoKLGrIhM1jsKn6qpBwfTBXW3WjJUQbk_m46_8Urr-zmyOv5FIl2hM69IYwdPeQUefDVS79A).

Even if it’s just $10, I’ll be able to continue sending you emails and start sending you quick texts so when they try and cut off my contact with you – **I’ll always have a way to reach you** – even if I have to mail you a letter!

Second – and this one is easy.

Just save this email address as a contact so my emails make it to your inbox. That’s been another issue all conservatives have been dealing with in the last month – they’re blocking our emails.

I’ll write soon, but please, [**make a quick donation**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/xEGPYjFHqXds6GVJ-tFnohCrYn1nPDTYv8-Vry_5ik0p9zEWZa8sFXbXKt0ZDZBCET8On1wYOK46bRVBYfvSLFRghsk-vahICJqj_TOVdxD9E5elyL7_YE0cWeFq7GBbMYTdIG4XvxYcLYHom1zsGc1VrDO1LdZjrhMzlwZc7O0vZbSo51BzXzxl9UbrTPEuayAtAsuBXwgmefxkZHolKbDfZo4PHNe2s0IpvO-g37v6wI82K7hIw11KK_zCIeAU16mhTHkRzUw7ojHN1skS9IM4rak2iMP5WH9rfw) and save my email address as a contact.

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---

720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/un/kPgToPr3ha2KVS2OK6uKiyQRK7f0XYku0PeCHwZP1vkLROYRzhTPfKv1aCjdjvIEdkFOSsAT4dw6zw9aYosOY3m8poSBtzaitJIlbjN_DBQ1ZFgkNrz6Vrm-dow8jZYZtFAxX7osqOv_VkzW)

| | Friends --

I wanted to share an state urgent budget update....

Right now, Albany Democrats**** are in the midst of negotiating a deal to give more than **2 BILLION DOLLARS to ex-convicts and illegal immigrants.**

That’s** more than ****4** TIMES what they have earmarked for property tax relief to New York families. Their priorities are completely and totally out of order.

People who insist on providing giveaways to criminals over essential services for law-abiding New Yorkers have no business serving in Albany.

I’m fighting to hold their feet to the fire. [**Will you join me?**](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=51a05336a9&e=9f843ba602)

Your support will help us defeat these out-of-touch politicians and send a message to Albany Democrats that the people of New York are tired of their misplaced priorities.

[**Please consider making any contribution you can to help me fight back against insane policies like this.**](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=0fdebd6314&e=9f843ba602)

Thank you,

Rob Ortt

name: Rodney Davis
subject: The Far-Left Can’t Stop Lying
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Rodney for Congress
body:
The Left is acting in bad faith.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zPE4777ahRLs2TxSLFV-DEnH8zQPSGdv8k_hYwdIpQYqaGqV2JLPSWuOFAaR-jSKSg2UfhUbERy43ZuFP0Ztovr7uKSvmNYQZZPtjRmlExXIKoe-801ILLJnwhFgCort9TIzd4mQBFZGdD7GY7iKgAfkH5z-6XduFlUzaItb_5hQav7JmoiGvR-qwxZ-VWcl3ZvhSmHXigzBxZfXxwUlyf4_QhVmxjXiTpj9WX8yfZSqCOOMMqewXBKPAcVtGOBX4Pmn9eUMeTtdOnS-6FMbA15bLDeTQ_sk_TD6PtfLolwaR62MPXsQuYgjsPFQWwAkd3dX_qapjKt-DH3TkI1LF3DxpXRTsfCwVLPOo5XdOs-TAsHSoOiWbrbACPrIMWNhjw00qns99ksVtKZMRlc4PnGtnPYtNbX9-zoKFvaCCMaijtK5z7m-CLH_ZyoGHqYb0o0itVxNOYH6R9AEbO-2bw==&c=QQEezPbAZQ_qR4B7uMifnGypYb1frN2fr3MxGQeTWEvUBlFp-cbVGA==&ch=4Xg3MUGbH04wgDjKAcnvhaFyQEcE8V705gS1kntsU1kUPR1ruL0DRA==)
Friend,
The list of Far-Left lies continues to grow. A few examples include:
* They lied when they said Joe Biden was a moderate centrist.
* They lied about Hunter Biden's laptop.
* They lied about the number of new jobs Biden's proposed infrastructure plan could create by _**SIX-FOLD**_.
* They lied when they refused to acknowledge a crisis at the border

The Left will continue to lie and spread misinformation unless we stop them. The best way to stop them is by flipping the House majority this election cycle.

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Democrats GUT election integrity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
We should be INCREASING ELECTION INTEGRITY measures, not gutting them. [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=8e2dcea211fb40298a42f980bc10ec8b&_e=tGstVCp7WUd915bj1n1eV4BOYX47-d92N1594ln4MfiLoXcyrS-iQZJ6A2q51xPlxRPHsVkikjjJ5TK79a03E6dwp4JXzcN0XiwJmH5-ctL9YewoE0x6PXxHgm7YSqsiiGUN5DrvGNLHM0XUlBZKyd3-ZbTscQlNC96-wyUnmcxRXaa4Bh5FsZKM7M2LQnox66djnJ1hyVYjmN6wtVosV108RR7o89I0YXCeDQwp9zkaVCHJPsTrWn1ODEykLX0LKlkWmD99uvqPI6nOO98_zWeChApMxzwlZfN2hyRFp2rGZCRIxnlluJBLRlGjC3HecW1jhN9bNc7m4LbVlUyWqqhkRI1trXEUTEkBJi0TzhQ%3D) | |
---
Peter,
Nancy Pelosi has controlled congress for less than three months, yet she is already ramming through **DANGEROUS, PARTISAN** legislation that **UNDERMINES ELECTION INTEGRITY**.

H.R. 1, what is being hyped by democrats as a “Voting Rights” bill, is nothing more than a thinly-veiled attempt to strong-arm the DNC platform into law.

Election integrity has never been more critical, as voter confidence across the nation is so shaken and damaged.

We should be **INCREASING ELECTION INTEGRITY** measures, not gutting them.

Democrats are pushing:
**UNRESTRICTED VOTE-BY-MAIL**
**NO VOTER ID**
**UNLIMITED BALLOT HARVESTING**

Democrats want to make it easier to cheat — we must stop them!

H.R. 1 was already rammed through the House, but I will fight this dangerous bill here in the Senate.

You have my word on that.

[_**DONATE HERE**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=8e2dcea211fb40298a42f980bc10ec8b&_e=tGstVCp7WUd915bj1n1eV2V08DLDRnDt-hEpp5WFSG-lweyTeYSrl0oa2FsyA3FT08hPMlk7DErMQOpEwFZqZGEdrWVaRpK6lf-akwT4J5E9tL9MpRf2WQa3RezZfHvmpn6KirR-m9ma6-Iq5dcsLo9s9Dj_FHYYvGm8uMZao-sEkLxpjfEmyNZDEtAMzEkGMH1U8AxKeEuC8phl4PUfXkKSpvT_AydsJS2E7wTbIoGFN5Z7UPVugowT4cZz3QU927bUFSs5E4HGjiSjF2-5rU-QN0cSw9OiOL5Wxt4ts-6CZyn2mMUc0RvO6LKsvZ2BbNpW_5wLquC9PccNkeIWL4J9WLqdD1AIVQG2rZekp1_I8HHYltUqLILWY0VKhd12JqkA4tdW4gszkpgHPqUEUA%3D%3D)

Thank you,
Josh Hawley

Keeping politics out of baseball is critical. If you agree, add your name to our petition!
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00132WKrZo8T3QWgOlYuFSQmUzbgzppapamzOiEhN3--QqJQigAdxtv3SXG4Sf9DYWtMmNWpB4s_MadguCzLO5opxgdcwoOmFPIR7m1zb9O8CamPs65XV4v2RqEFwHNCS6jo8IARysuspEFg-0cdFa7MXbRscHeCPBiJ6S5yBvk85v2ebdBsWXjGPqYfUWRFZBbikAuwtXmr15xmi8E7hijjnQADZiekYd86eDqPcSwLKJteQk3tGgbwkxUNMV-1LU8dEUrhJxDyH_gha0-Szj5_9YGnse3wxFBK2NRqW9voYIh_0ZzA1_5DH9TQLm2MAetKIBYRh1ETGQSiRX-R7BjSALLubRpsp3ebxJ9BrNaFaW3m9LoVP7VYOSV_vY58ATioxkVoiC0NDPgEn0dTFvrKLlXD0xuW4coTwiHUJrViQbeQG1s3TJejpGxuWUyDAz6MZWNHiYRDm3txO74oJU4sF9_UnlAUeb8&c=LKIhNLliwR8ohAZRmOliaFlWwURMZjC7H2XO1AVwmPaSf12w8Nd8LQ==&ch=9RNP5LGbUDWJRbkP6abXYS-UdF6uD5KpJ3NooALZdsE654IWV_6tEw==)

Friend,

The baseball world was once a place that brought people together. Major League Baseball (MLB) decided to ruin that by playing politics.

The MLB pushed a liberal agenda on the sport when they moved their annual All-Star game out of Georgia over leftist misinformation about Georgia's new election law.

[_**Keeping politics out of baseball is critical. If you agree, add your name to our petition.**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00132WKrZo8T3QWgOlYuFSQmUzbgzppapamzOiEhN3--QqJQigAdxtv3SXG4Sf9DYWtMmNWpB4s_MadguCzLO5opxgdcwoOmFPIR7m1zb9O8CamPs65XV4v2RqEFwHNCS6jo8IARysuspEFg-0cdFa7MXbRscHeCPBiJ6S5yBvk85v2ebdBsWXjGPqYfUWRFZBbikAuwtXmr15xmi8E7hijjnQADZiekYd86eDqPcSwLKJteQk3tGgbwkxUNMV-1LU8dEUrhJxDyH_gha0-Szj5_9YGnse3wxFBK2NRqW9voYIh_0ZzA1_5DH9TQLm2MAetKIBYRh1ETGQSiRX-R7BjSALLubRpsp3ebxJ9BrNaFaW3m9LoVP7VYOSV_vY58ATioxkVoiC0NDPgEn0dTFvrKLlXD0xuW4coTwiHUJrViQbeQG1s3TJejpGxuWUyDAz6MZWNHiYRDm3txO74oJU4sF9_UnlAUeb8&c=LKIhNLliwR8ohAZRmOliaFlWwURMZjC7H2XO1AVwmPaSf12w8Nd8LQ==&ch=9RNP5LGbUDWJRbkP6abXYS-UdF6uD5KpJ3NooALZdsE654IWV_6tEw==)
****[Add your name to the Petition](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00132WKrZo8T3QWgOlYuFSQmUzbgzppapamzOiEhN3--QqJQigAdxtv3SXG4Sf9DYWtMmNWpB4s_MadguCzLO5opxgdcwoOmFPIR7m1zb9O8CamPs65XV4v2RqEFwHNCS6jo8IARysuspEFg-0cdFa7MXbRscHeCPBiJ6S5yBvk85v2ebdBsWXjGPqYfUWRFZBbikAuwtXmr15xmi8E7hijjnQADZiekYd86eDqPcSwLKJteQk3tGgbwkxUNMV-1LU8dEUrhJxDyH_gha0-Szj5_9YGnse3wxFBK2NRqW9voYIh_0ZzA1_5DH9TQLm2MAetKIBYRh1ETGQSiRX-R7BjSALLubRpsp3ebxJ9BrNaFaW3m9LoVP7VYOSV_vY58ATioxkVoiC0NDPgEn0dTFvrKLlXD0xuW4coTwiHUJrViQbeQG1s3TJejpGxuWUyDAz6MZWNHiYRDm3txO74oJU4sF9_UnlAUeb8&c=LKIhNLliwR8ohAZRmOliaFlWwURMZjC7H2XO1AVwmPaSf12w8Nd8LQ==&ch=9RNP5LGbUDWJRbkP6abXYS-UdF6uD5KpJ3NooALZdsE654IWV_6tEw==)****
Major League Baseball caved to pressure from Radical Leftists, who continue to spread propaganda and lies about the contents of the law.

This decision by the MLB will now cost tens of millions of dollars in revenue to the city of Atlanta, which is where the game was originally going to be played.

By pandering to Radical Leftists, Major League Baseball infused politics into the sport and divided Americans even further.

[**Add your name here to the petition to keep politics out of baseball.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00132WKrZo8T3QWgOlYuFSQmUzbgzppapamzOiEhN3--QqJQigAdxtv3SXG4Sf9DYWtMmNWpB4s_MadguCzLO5opxgdcwoOmFPIR7m1zb9O8CamPs65XV4v2RqEFwHNCS6jo8IARysuspEFg-0cdFa7MXbRscHeCPBiJ6S5yBvk85v2ebdBsWXjGPqYfUWRFZBbikAuwtXmr15xmi8E7hijjnQADZiekYd86eDqPcSwLKJteQk3tGgbwkxUNMV-1LU8dEUrhJxDyH_gha0-Szj5_9YGnse3wxFBK2NRqW9voYIh_0ZzA1_5DH9TQLm2MAetKIBYRh1ETGQSiRX-R7BjSALLubRpsp3ebxJ9BrNaFaW3m9LoVP7VYOSV_vY58ATioxkVoiC0NDPgEn0dTFvrKLlXD0xuW4coTwiHUJrViQbeQG1s3TJejpGxuWUyDAz6MZWNHiYRDm3txO74oJU4sF9_UnlAUeb8&c=LKIhNLliwR8ohAZRmOliaFlWwURMZjC7H2XO1AVwmPaSf12w8Nd8LQ==&ch=9RNP5LGbUDWJRbkP6abXYS-UdF6uD5KpJ3NooALZdsE654IWV_6tEw==)

Do you agree, %%First Name%%? &zwnj
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZCxLV_q6BSXq-Lk2PMBZ_lJNrvwaYbEF1slV_We_KB17D2cdxKgQvl42mNRgjvQYofguY5Nl1xOdQ49LJB0su7LEYoS2Q6IId-x86a0KIYIxC-q2PFhY89uUfKea8-wdcxHN9JFIsRCFQwMUo0OiGDmhW8trFvROpKQ3kWg6tfUzccH1vpe51Alvqs4gcP7FiEnL9_ufBCYxr_jhC-5VhQvF_QJCbADxM-iPtei8k14P-SF38_t8WIIPL9js5Uz25iX7AgyrE1qlSSHtneFtqLgJWr_EPab27WLVimFrTSq6zd68zll9cMUkdW0IEwkl95stpQZLuDC2r1xk2BEEIzMn8eW6w132WPcbm_0ZdKeuijKw-c5vTzKIlEXEKizqogX_E3uwm00qbKcimPiswsYNUgMVZCbC&c=z9sYSzw_NsGhVrnwUZvsCJfyMKo8ZNF9DQyBff_4VCSB_vqTlDUYpQ==&ch=1I1C0a7AD2fc6EJQGf2hECHZxMgHOYq0--zK-OKHj10G3nStQ6bsXw==) [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZCxLV_q6BSXq-Lk2PMBZ_lJNrvwaYbEF1slV_We_KB17D2cdxKgQvl42mNRgjvQYofguY5Nl1xOdQ49LJB0su7LEYoS2Q6IId-x86a0KIYIxC-q2PFhY89uUfKea8-wdcxHN9JFIsRCFQwMUo0OiGDmhW8trFvROpKQ3kWg6tfUzccH1vpe51Alvqs4gcP7FiEnL9_ufBCYxr_jhC-5VhQvF_QJCbADxM-iPtei8k14P-SF38_t8WIIPL9js5Uz25iX7AgyrE1qlSSHtneFtqLgJWr_EPab27WLVimFrTSq6zd68zll9cMUkdW0IEwkl95stpQZLuDC2r1xk2BEEIzMn8eW6w132WPcbm_0ZdKeuijKw-c5vTzKIlEXEKizqogX_E3uwm00qbKcimPiswsYNUgMVZCbC&c=z9sYSzw_NsGhVrnwUZvsCJfyMKo8ZNF9DQyBff_4VCSB_vqTlDUYpQ==&ch=1I1C0a7AD2fc6EJQGf2hECHZxMgHOYq0--zK-OKHj10G3nStQ6bsXw==) Friend,

The right to free and fair elections is one of the most sacred and important liberties we have in this nation.

Unfortunately, millions of Americans have lost faith in our democratic system. That's why, as your next Governor, I will do everything in my power to support FAIR and TRANSPARENT elections. [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZCxLV_q6BSXq-Lk2PMBZ_lJNrvwaYbEF1slV_We_KB17D2cdxKgQvl42mNRgjvQYofguY5Nl1xOdQ49LJB0su7LEYoS2Q6IId-x86a0KIYIxC-q2PFhY89uUfKea8-wdcxHN9JFIsRCFQwMUo0OiGDmhW8trFvROpKQ3kWg6tfUzccH1vpe51Alvqs4gcP7FiEnL9_ufBCYxr_jhC-5VhQvF_QJCbADxM-iPtei8k14P-SF38_t8WIIPL9js5Uz25iX7AgyrE1qlSSHtneFtqLgJWr_EPab27WLVimFrTSq6zd68zll9cMUkdW0IEwkl95stpQZLuDC2r1xk2BEEIzMn8eW6w132WPcbm_0ZdKeuijKw-c5vTzKIlEXEKizqogX_E3uwm00qbKcimPiswsYNUgMVZCbC&c=z9sYSzw_NsGhVrnwUZvsCJfyMKo8ZNF9DQyBff_4VCSB_vqTlDUYpQ==&ch=1I1C0a7AD2fc6EJQGf2hECHZxMgHOYq0--zK-OKHj10G3nStQ6bsXw==) _And, Friend, my election integrity plan, TERRIFIES the radical liberals. _ [**DO WE NEED TO DO MORE TO SECURE OUR ELECTIONS?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZCxLV_q6BSXq-Lk2PMBZ_lJNrvwaYbEF1slV_We_KB17D2cdxKgQvl42mNRgjvQYofguY5Nl1xOdQ49LJB0su7LEYoS2Q6IId-x86a0KIYIxC-q2PFhY89uUfKea8-wdcxHN9JFIsRCFQwMUo0OiGDmhW8trFvROpKQ3kWg6tfUzccH1vpe51Alvqs4gcP7FiEnL9_ufBCYxr_jhC-5VhQvF_QJCbADxM-iPtei8k14P-SF38_t8WIIPL9js5Uz25iX7AgyrE1qlSSHtneFtqLgJWr_EPab27WLVimFrTSq6zd68zll9cMUkdW0IEwkl95stpQZLuDC2r1xk2BEEIzMn8eW6w132WPcbm_0ZdKeuijKw-c5vTzKIlEXEKizqogX_E3uwm00qbKcimPiswsYNUgMVZCbC&c=z9sYSzw_NsGhVrnwUZvsCJfyMKo8ZNF9DQyBff_4VCSB_vqTlDUYpQ==&ch=1I1C0a7AD2fc6EJQGf2hECHZxMgHOYq0--zK-OKHj10G3nStQ6bsXw==) **[**ANSWER HERE -> **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZCxLV_q6BSXq-Lk2PMBZ_lJNrvwaYbEF1slV_We_KB17D2cdxKgQvl42mNRgjvQYofguY5Nl1xOdQ49LJB0su7LEYoS2Q6IId-x86a0KIYIxC-q2PFhY89uUfKea8-wdcxHN9JFIsRCFQwMUo0OiGDmhW8trFvROpKQ3kWg6tfUzccH1vpe51Alvqs4gcP7FiEnL9_ufBCYxr_jhC-5VhQvF_QJCbADxM-iPtei8k14P-SF38_t8WIIPL9js5Uz25iX7AgyrE1qlSSHtneFtqLgJWr_EPab27WLVimFrTSq6zd68zll9cMUkdW0IEwkl95stpQZLuDC2r1xk2BEEIzMn8eW6w132WPcbm_0ZdKeuijKw-c5vTzKIlEXEKizqogX_E3uwm00qbKcimPiswsYNUgMVZCbC&c=z9sYSzw_NsGhVrnwUZvsCJfyMKo8ZNF9DQyBff_4VCSB_vqTlDUYpQ==&ch=1I1C0a7AD2fc6EJQGf2hECHZxMgHOYq0--zK-OKHj10G3nStQ6bsXw==)**
As the next governor of the Commonwealth of Virginia, I will actively work to promote transparency and confidence when Virginians cast their votes.

I strongly support voter ID, signature matching, up to date voter rolls, and establishing a voter fraud hotline.

If our trust in our elections is eroded, then our country as we know it is over. So we need your opinion on this, [_**do we need to do more to secure our elections?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZCxLV_q6BSXq-Lk2PMBZ_lJNrvwaYbEF1slV_We_KB17D2cdxKgQvl42mNRgjvQYofguY5Nl1xOdQ49LJB0su7LEYoS2Q6IId-x86a0KIYIxC-q2PFhY89uUfKea8-wdcxHN9JFIsRCFQwMUo0OiGDmhW8trFvROpKQ3kWg6tfUzccH1vpe51Alvqs4gcP7FiEnL9_ufBCYxr_jhC-5VhQvF_QJCbADxM-iPtei8k14P-SF38_t8WIIPL9js5Uz25iX7AgyrE1qlSSHtneFtqLgJWr_EPab27WLVimFrTSq6zd68zll9cMUkdW0IEwkl95stpQZLuDC2r1xk2BEEIzMn8eW6w132WPcbm_0ZdKeuijKw-c5vTzKIlEXEKizqogX_E3uwm00qbKcimPiswsYNUgMVZCbC&c=z9sYSzw_NsGhVrnwUZvsCJfyMKo8ZNF9DQyBff_4VCSB_vqTlDUYpQ==&ch=1I1C0a7AD2fc6EJQGf2hECHZxMgHOYq0--zK-OKHj10G3nStQ6bsXw==)
**[**ANSWER NOW -> **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZCxLV_q6BSXq-Lk2PMBZ_lJNrvwaYbEF1slV_We_KB17D2cdxKgQvl42mNRgjvQYofguY5Nl1xOdQ49LJB0su7LEYoS2Q6IId-x86a0KIYIxC-q2PFhY89uUfKea8-wdcxHN9JFIsRCFQwMUo0OiGDmhW8trFvROpKQ3kWg6tfUzccH1vpe51Alvqs4gcP7FiEnL9_ufBCYxr_jhC-5VhQvF_QJCbADxM-iPtei8k14P-SF38_t8WIIPL9js5Uz25iX7AgyrE1qlSSHtneFtqLgJWr_EPab27WLVimFrTSq6zd68zll9cMUkdW0IEwkl95stpQZLuDC2r1xk2BEEIzMn8eW6w132WPcbm_0ZdKeuijKw-c5vTzKIlEXEKizqogX_E3uwm00qbKcimPiswsYNUgMVZCbC&c=z9sYSzw_NsGhVrnwUZvsCJfyMKo8ZNF9DQyBff_4VCSB_vqTlDUYpQ==&ch=1I1C0a7AD2fc6EJQGf2hECHZxMgHOYq0--zK-OKHj10G3nStQ6bsXw==)**
Having secure and fair elections is the foundation of the freedoms we enjoy here in Virginia. It's disturbing to me that so many Virginians and Americans have lost faith in our process.

As your next Governor, I will restore faith and accountability in our elections.

Thank you,

Pete Snyder

clean_body: Do you agree, %%First Name%%? &zwnj == == Friend, The right to free and fair elections is one of the most sacred and important liberties we have in this nation. Unfortunately, millions of Americans have lost faith in our democratic system. That's why, as your next Governor, I will do everything in my power to support FAIR and TRANSPARENT elections. == And, Friend, my election integrity plan, TERRIFIES the radical liberals. == == As the next governor of the Commonwealth of Virginia, I will actively work to promote transparency and confidence when Virginians cast their votes. I strongly support voter ID, signature matching, up to date voter rolls, and establishing a voter fraud hotline. If our trust in our elections is eroded, then our country as we know it is over. So we need your opinion on this, == == Having secure and fair elections is the foundation of the freedoms we enjoy here in Virginia. It's disturbing to me that so many Virginians and Americans have lost faith in our process. As your next Governor, I will restore faith and accountability in our elections. Thank you, Pete Snyder Get involved with Team Pete Today! Follow us on == and ==. == To receive text updates text PETE4VA to 47682. * We’ve worked tirelessly together to keep our city, local businesses, and schools supported during the pandemic.
* We took proactive steps to power the Helena community with 100% clean, renewable electricity by 2030, investing in a bright future for the next generations.
* We have also taken major steps to revitalize the economic drivers of tourism and travel within the city of Helena, leading to various projects throughout the city that will create jobs and revenue for the city and its taxpayers.
* We tackled the snow removal problems that plagued our city and created safe winter roads for all.

**[There is so much to be proud of, but there is also so much left to be done. name: Judicial Watch Action
subject: NEW VIDEO: HS Football Coach Fired for Objecting to BLM/Critical Race Theory in Daughter’s Class!
body: Coach fired over objection to Critical Race Theory! [INSIDE JW] NEW VIDEO: HS Football Coach Fired for Objecting to BLM/Critical Race Theory in Daughter’s Class! [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53330&L=1956&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vY2hhbm5lbC9VQ0dEYU9aZzJJTkMwUWcyWjIwM0YxZEE/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1hY3Rpb24rYWxlcnQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDQwNjE5Mjk1OA==] Judicial Watch announced that it filed a federal lawsuit on behalf of David Flynn, the father of two Dedham Public School students, who was removed from his position as head football coach after exercising his right as a citizen to raise concerns about his daughter’s seventh-grade history class curriculum being changed to include biased coursework on politics, race, gender equality, and diversity (Flynn v. Forrest et al. (No. 21-cv-10256)). The lawsuit, which was filed in the United States District Court for the District of Massachusetts, seeks damages against the superintendent, high school principal, and high school athletic director for retaliating against Flynn for exercising his First Amendment rights. The lawsuit details that in September 2020, Flynn’s daughter’s seventh-grade history class, which was listed as “World Geography and Ancient History I,” was taught issues of race, gender, stereotypes, prejudices, discrimination, and politics. **🚨** _**CHAIRMAN JIM BANKS NEWS ALERT**_**🚨** Fellow Conservative, Did you see House Conservatives Fund Chairman Jim Banks on Tucker Carlson? On Tucker Carlson’s show, he talked about the future of the GOP, and revealed the _**truth**_ about the Democratic Party.
The Democratic Party only represents far left interests that seek to cancel the views of conservatives and hard working Americans.
**Here’s the truth: Tucker Carlson highlighted Banks’ vision of the Republican Party, and what their future holds. Fellow Conservative, the future is clear. The GOP is the TRUE American working class Party.** [](http://links.houseconservatives.com/u/click?_t=2f157a537fc642c9aa7481bf474f3189&_m=2a40d82947ca4941ad08879e4c486025&_e=UBqGLbioe9ctoZeZlbjyjlrqYI1M6m0utpOf2rJuMYOqO0qbG6SXBr7sn80KEseU0n-nOT_ihfjAtgAdkov8g9BJlXjHxYHLpFH1PI6fJgoquq-_fmRpKXGNf-iBcNez8gefSWd-xg3heD0a890aGi4PVX5Aci-9O6UfxH_4dyRzk59hMKY6RVUz3CCCJSworfcN4756K_4PiFEm1tfdZ8auoCSFvtEwngp2LQpCP13Gg2h6CTtB5oILLh-2f5Hy5a3hcixcc8cjzFTEkfj6aMnpV-0cxM1ur8qquNN-KhWBtnnAZ1Z7v6Ye0ozho2iWJQckBsxJGVtzQnI7RqDVG0ru4N7WASyoiMSIAuT530lExgkleFa6e3nbbZrZRYxHyBESRrhwM1vdhg_pv9ydyycfUZRaYgH2z7KxTheCzrwRjMEBtFlpbXw838hBDwQFKbGyjtACdBlah03BESHQjAPat47eNM9fX5k8tJLKzAg%3D) [**STAND WITH THE GOP, THE WORKING CLASS PARTY**](http://links.houseconservatives.com/u/click?_t=2f157a537fc642c9aa7481bf474f3189&_m=2a40d82947ca4941ad08879e4c486025&_e=UBqGLbioe9ctoZeZlbjyjlrqYI1M6m0utpOf2rJuMYOqO0qbG6SXBr7sn80KEseU0n-nOT_ihfjAtgAdkov8g9BJlXjHxYHLpFH1PI6fJgoquq-_fmRpKXGNf-iBcNez8gefSWd-xg3heD0a890aGi4PVX5Aci-9O6UfxH_4dyRzk59hMKY6RVUz3CCCJSworfcN4756K_4PiFEm1tfdZ8auoCSFvtEwngp2LQpCP13LYWgOglRtwdjm6XONj-7EUibKksnoNrE0t3ird_BeaUT1-A26jL-fkvOqgRg9qT7yCedH_9_lfopaWrYk7SlSV-iWwgPMorSRrp3mXGvukjReOC4KHODIwV_rMPY3YGwddlSEjf6fkRj-JCoVKYz6ExPhSt1P_hnscpFZ7q2OslQ8n96HUqJUfIMSfTAhF0VPn-oONj1fYeaOs8On3vjhID7l31RXnTGIeJ28_TWrUi7lYJU8HPIMDL2R_mt1rBI%3D) For generations, Democrats have claimed to be the party of the middle class, but now the evidence is in that they could not have been **FURTHER** from the truth. According to Jim Bank’s illuminating memo to Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy, of those who donated to the 2020 presidential campaigns:
* **79% of mechanics donated to Trump**
* **Wall Street donors gave more than 3 times as much to Biden as they did to Trump**
* **94% of college professors donated to Biden**

name: Team AOC
subject: Here’s what happened in Nevada
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
There’s a big controversy going on in Nevada. Let us explain:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210406-1994-header&t=1&akid=1994%2E2526796%2EozY4qn)
**We’ll start with the good news.** Our movement just celebrated a major win in Nevada. Last month, a coalition of progressive DSA candidates swept all five leadership positions in the Nevada Democratic Party elections.
These candidates ran on a progressive platform and the promise of reforming the party from the inside out. That includes organizing 365 days a year, investing in outreach to immigrant communities and communities of color, and using the party as a vehicle not just to win elections, but to advocate for policies like climate action and health care for all.
**The bad news is** that in response to their victory, the state party’s establishment staff **all resigned and transferred $450,000 out of the party** before the new leadership took over.
Now, we have a team of progressive allies in Nevada who are ready to transform the Democratic Party in their state. **But they are facing limited resources and a depleted bank account.** We need them to succeed — and we need to have their backs.
That’s why we’re asking:
[Can you rush a $3 contribution to the new Nevada Democratic Party today? Together we can raise back the $450,000 that establishment forces transferred out of the party and make sure our progressive allies succeed in their new roles.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8512?refcode=em20210406-1994&t=2&akid=1994%2E2526796%2EozY4qn)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8512?refcode=em20210406-1994&t=3&akid=1994%2E2526796%2EozY4qn)**
They’ve set a fundraising goal of $450,000 to replace the money that was transferred so they can invest in the organizing work that got them elected – including outreach to rural communities, Latino voters, and working people.
Their goals are to grow the party from the bottom-up and invest in county parties across the state as well as local caucuses.
With this new leadership and enough resources, **Nevada can be an example for the rest of the country and show that a Democratic Socialist Party is not only possible, but inevitable with consistent grassroots fundraising and organizing.**
[**Please make a $3 contribution to the new Nevada Democratic Party today. Let's raise back the $450,000 that establishment forces transferred out of the party before the new progressive leadership took office.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8512?refcode=em20210406-1994&t=4&akid=1994%2E2526796%2EozY4qn)
Thanks for chipping in.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210406-1994-footer&t=5&refcode2=1994_2526796_ozY4qn&akid=1994%2E2526796%2EozY4qn)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=6&akid=1994%2E2526796%2EozY4qn) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=7&akid=1994%2E2526796%2EozY4qn) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=8&akid=1994%2E2526796%2EozY4qn)
Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you'd like to update your contact information, **[click here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=9&akid=1994%2E2526796%2EozY4qn)**. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=1994%2E2526796%2EozY4qn). To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
Email us: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: John Burke
subject: This is unacceptable!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
Californians are suffering under Gavin Newsom’s failed leadership. Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/59d7aa76e3bab63f/78b34d60a9059bf1c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Peter, California’s Employment Development Department has failed too many of our citizens — including our heroic wildland firefighters. Kevin recently shared an op-ed from Kelly Ramsey, a seasonal firefighter who was DENIED unemployment benefits by the EDD, with the reason listed, “You did not perform work during the above period.” **Ramsey wrote that when he started sharing his plight on social media, he got an overwhelming response:_No one was getting unemployment benefits._** This is absolutely unacceptable! Californians like Kelly Ramsey literally put their lives on the line to keep us safe, and now they’re unable to get the help they need, when they need it. Fixing the deep problems with the EDD is at the top of Kevin’s list as your next governor of California. It’s one of Gavin Newsom’s MANY failures as the top executive of the Golden State, and it’s why we’re getting closer to a recall election every single day. We must prioritize fixing this now, so that we can take care of people like Kelly Ramsey, who keep us safe from deadly wildfires. **Please take just a moment to share[Kevin’s Facebook post about Kelly’s plight](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/59d7aa76e3bab63f/3116c416af998722c3d6b838967d376c/34943), and spread the word about the need for change!** [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/59d7aa76e3bab63f/0898352ddca51f90c3d6b838967d376c/34943) We must get the word out that the EDD is failing Californians, so that we can demand change at the ballot box this November. We need a real leader, not Gavin Newsom who has failed our firefighters time and again. **Stand up for our firefighters by helping us spread the word online. With your help, we can get their message out, and get help on the way.** Thanks for sharing,
John Burke, Communications Director | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/59d7aa76e3bab63f/be51abfc6998f3eac3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/59d7aa76e3bab63f/c0624feb0b6f4fcec3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/59d7aa76e3bab63f/cf48ed3ae46fd882c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

clean_body: Californians are suffering under Gavin Newsom’s failed leadership. Read more >> Peter, California’s Employment Development Department has failed too many of our citizens — including our heroic wildland firefighters. Kevin recently shared an op-ed from Kelly Ramsey, a seasonal firefighter who was DENIED unemployment benefits by the EDD, with the reason listed, “You did not perform work during the above period.” Ramsey wrote that when he started sharing his plight on social media, he got an overwhelming response:No one was getting unemployment benefits. This is absolutely unacceptable! Californians like Kelly Ramsey literally put their lives on the line to keep us safe, and now they’re unable to get the help they need, when they need it. Fixing the deep problems with the EDD is at the top of Kevin’s list as your next governor of California. It’s one of Gavin Newsom’s MANY failures as the top executive of the Golden State, and it’s why we’re getting closer to a recall election every single day. We must prioritize fixing this now, so that we can take care of people like Kelly Ramsey, who keep us safe from deadly wildfires. Please take just a moment to share, and spread the word about the need for change! We must get the word out that the EDD is failing Californians, so that we can demand change at the ballot box this November. We need a real leader, not Gavin Newsom who has failed our firefighters time and again. Stand up for our firefighters by helping us spread the word online. With your help, we can get their message out, and get help on the way. Thanks for sharing, John Burke, Communications Director | | | | ---|---|--- id:2021-03-29-19:44:03:945t Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
